calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jul-31-2019 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jan-10-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Amanda Ebey for Administrator.

Ms. Ebey stated that she has not encountered this before, that her guess is this could be looked at as a preliminary distribution on the part of the Administrator to the Heirs, and that she can file receipts for the remaining $1,000.00 and get the estate closed. Ms. Ebey also stated that the property was sold, that the Sisters had no where to go, that her Client has health issues, that there are no creditors and that all of the bills were paid. In addition, Ms. Ebey stated that her Client sent her a cashier's check in the amount of $17,000.00 as a show of good faith which she is holding in her drawer and that her Client has offered to explain herself to the Court. The First and Final Report of Personal Representative on Waiver of Account, etc. is under submission.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.
